title: Toro's Auto Mine
description: Mod that allows players to automatically mine while being afk
body:
Toro's Auto Mine

  • For Minecraft Fabric 1.18-26
  • Client-side mod
  • Works even when minecraft is minimized. (Multiplayer/Lan only)
  • Default toggle keybind is "K" but you can change it anytime at Options>Controls>Key Binds>Toro's Auto Mine
  • Works on both single & multiplayer
  • Requires Fabric API 
  • Requires OwO Lib (1.18.X - 1.21.10)
  • Requires Cloth Config (since 1.12.11)
  • Use /owo-config toros-auto-mine to open the config screen. Alternatively you can install Mod Menu to easily configure this mod.

If you have any suggestions for future updates please write them in my discord server

Be careful with using it on multiplayer servers as it might be considered cheating!
